commit.subject: LU-9859 libcfs: use wait_event_timeout() in tracefiled().
commit.message:
LU-9859 libcfs: use wait_event_timeout() in tracefiled().

By using wait_event_timeout() we can make it more clear what is being
waited for, and when the loop terminates.

Linux-commit: 259ff7028c47f14f03fed91cb2b96601db4b3c0d

Change-Id: I2384006122bba7dab0b719dabc65ca0056de3aad
Signed-off-by: NeilBrown <neilb@suse.de>
